description: This strappy number will raise your glam quotient when you pair it with skinny jeans or a little black dress for a night out with the girls. Its sturdy soles and vibrant interlaced straps are made for strutting around. Giving your feet that delicate look, yet comfortable feel. heels: 2.5" Upper Criss-cross straps starting from the forefoot and joining at the heel collar Zippered heel collar Soft footbed for instep comfort Brand embossed on the footbed Outsole TPU outsole with heels for enhanced grip and traction Sandal Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
